Arm results:

deviations: Behavioral metrics (ASR, refusal_rate) use pattern-based heuristics; LLM-judge recommended for production.
logit_bias arm has no layer/timing structure; it serves as a mechanically-orthogonal baseline.
Effect sizes from single seeds are proxies; full Hedges' g requires n>=3 independent replication.
